name: BLOOMIA HOLDINGS, INC.
summary: Bloomia Holdings (formerly Lendway, Inc.) is a specialty agricultural company and majority owner of Bloomia, one of the largest producers of fresh cut tulips in the United States. Bloomia hydroponically grows tulips from bulbs purchased in the Netherlands and Southern Hemisphere, nurturing over 95 million stems annually in 2024, and sells fresh cut tulip stems to mass-market retailers primarily on the U.S. East Coast, with operations also in the Netherlands and South Africa.
